name: Certainty Before Entry
description: The person wants enough certainty before entering a new branch.
life_effect: The main risk is not bad action, but losing timing while preparing to avoid bad action.

name: Private Simulation Loop
description: The person thinks deeply alone, but may need an external witness to close the loop.
life_effect: Insight becomes powerful only when converted into a visible test.

name: Pressure-Escape Decision
description: When pressure exceeds capacity, the person may decide through withdrawal rather than negotiation.
life_effect: Some life changes may look sudden from outside but were internally delayed for a long time.

name: Small Experiment Ready
description: The person already has enough skill material to run a small external experiment.
life_effect: A visible low-risk test is more suitable than a dramatic full reset.

name: Approval-Weighted Choice
description: The decision field is weighted by how others may evaluate the choice.
life_effect: The person may mistake social permission for inner clarity.
